description: Product Description Mens Thermal Knitted Gloves When Blisteringly Cold Temperatures Hit It Is Usually The End Of Your Limbs That Are Hit The Hardest. This Obviously Includes Your Hands. If You Are Looking For Gloves With Expert Knitting And Effective Lining Then These Mens Thinsulate Gloves Full Finger Gloves With Thinsulate Lining Are The Items You Need To Keep Your Hands Warm And Protected. Touch Screen Women Knitted Gloves Thinsulate Lined Full Finger Thermal Winter Woolly Work The Inner Lining Is Made With 3M Thinsulate Lining The Purpose Of The Lining Is To Hold Warm Air Inside The Gloves And To Keep The Hot Air Close To Your Skin. The Ribbed Cuff On The Gloves Is Tight Enough To Stop The Warm Air Escaping, Whilst Comfortable.
